run_summary.summary: Flexsteel pipeline moving 💼 Ian Saunders (Popfly) sent the campaign link today for Liz to upload video drafts — the Zecliner deal is officially in content mode. Ian asked for a draft upload timeline and posting schedule (posts 1 week apart). Invoicing also goes through the Popfly platform once the project wraps. Ball is squarely in our court to get drafts started and share a timeline with Ian ASAP. Separately, the two gifted-only shoe campaigns that came in (Remonte, Rieker) are product exchange only — no cash — so skipping those.

suggestions.message: Ian (ian@popfly.com) is waiting on two things: (1) a timeline for when Liz will upload her first two video drafts to the Popfly campaign link, and (2) her posting schedule — he wants posts 1 week apart. Worth replying today or tomorrow to give him those dates. Also a heads up: once the project is done, the invoice gets submitted through the Popfly platform too (not via email).

deals.next_action: Upload video drafts to Popfly campaign link and reply to Ian with draft timeline + posting schedule (posts 1 week apart)
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Ian (Popfly) sent campaign link to upload video drafts for brand review/approval. Invoice also submitted through Popfly platform at project completion. Asked for: (1) timeline for first two drafts, (2) posting schedule — wants posts 1 week apart. Zecliner (ceramic, lift chair) being shipped by Steinhafels.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Ian (Popfly) sent campaign draft link — submit drafts there + share posting schedule (1 week between posts)
